title: Crystal Beam Attractor
description: Create cool builds by making the End Crystals beam onto blocks of your choosing!
body:
# Crystal Beam Attractor
End Crystal beams are very short-lived in the Minecraft world. They can be seen when re-spawning the Ender Dragon, yet they have great visuals that, if accessible, can be used in a lot of creative ways!  
Crystal Beam Attractor is a simple mod that adds an item to allow you to spawn beams from an End Crystal to any place that you want!

## Usage
Craft the Beam Link Tool.  
Right click on a block to save the position to link the beams to, then right click on the End Crystal that you want linked to that position. It is as simple as that.
If you want to remove a beam link, simply Sneak + Right Click with the tool on the End Crystal.

Note: If done in the end, the beams might be undone by respawning the Ender Dragon.

## Recipe

![Recipe for the Beam Link Tool](https://i.imgur.com/NVYty7B.png)
